prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东综合类最低位次分别为约40321、44405、46704、60500、63106名，呈持续后移趋势，近两年后移幅度明显加大（2024年较2023年后移约13800名 ，2025年较2024年后移约2600名），2025年基准位次约63106名；该校在山东综合类招生计划2021年64人、2022年75人、2023年69人、2024年78人、2025年81人 ，呈小幅扩招态势；2026年计划大幅增至110人，较2025年扩招约35.8%，显著缓解录取竞争压力，是影响位次变化的最关键因素。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 贵州大学是211工 程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第135名→2022年第125名→2023年第109名→2024年第95名→2025年第86名→2026年第85名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实 力和认可度不断增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告设置不当引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉；抖音热度总排名第76位，评价为一般，短视频平台 曝光度处于中等偏低水平；近年未见明显投档断档记录。整体声誉信号对报考热度有轻微抑制作用；第五轮学科评估中，植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上 学科；与招生专业中的植物保护专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5. 7%，竞争基数扩大；贵州大学位于贵州省贵阳市，对山东考生而言属于跨省就 读，地域偏好因素不显著；该校在山东招生计划近年持续增加，2026年大幅扩招，体现对山东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩 招约35.8%（最大利好因素）、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%（竞争加剧）、学校排名持续上升（吸引力增强）以及声誉偏负面（轻微抑制），考 虑考生规模扩大和声誉因素做小幅回调，预测2026年最低位次约76161名，区间75661–76661名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年贵州大学在山东综合类大幅扩招至110人，预计最低位次约76161名，区间75661–76661名。位次在此区间内的考生可以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业作为冲刺，三档专业 作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<75661名）可重点冲刺计算机类、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（约76661名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中 位次要求较低的专业。植物保护（A-学科）虽属三档但学科实力突出，对农林方向感兴趣的考生可重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong Comprehensive category were approximately 40321, 44405, 46704, 60500, and 63106, showing a continuous backward trend, with a significant increase in the backward magnitude in the last two years (2024 moved back about 13800 places compared to 2023, and 2025 moved back about 2600 places compared to 2024). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 63106. The enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Comprehensive category was 64 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 81 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 110, an expansion of about 35.8% compared to 2025, significantly alleviating admission competition pressure, which is the most critical factor affecting ranking changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 135th in 2021 → 125th in 2022 → 109th in 2023 → 95th in 2024 → 86th in 2025 → 85th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate settings in a recruitment announcement that caused public opinion; the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized. The overall Douyin heat ranking is 76th, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded in recent years. Overall reputation signals have a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university. It directly corresponds to the Plant Protection major in the enrollment majors, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Shandong Province general college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, which is an out-of-province study option for Shandong candidates, with no significant regional preference factor. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong has been increasing in recent years, with a significant expansion in 2026, reflecting its emphasis on Shandong student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 35.8% (the biggest positive factor), the increase in the total number of Shandong candidates by about 5.7% (intensified competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (increased attractiveness), and the slightly negative reputation (mild inhibition), with a small adjustment for the expansion of the candidate pool and reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 76161, with a range of 75661–76661.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Guizhou University significantly expands its enrollment in Shandong Comprehensive category to 110, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 76161, range 75661–76661. Candidates within this ranking range should prioritize Tier 2 majors as their main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<75661) can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (about 76661) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Plant Protection (A- discipline), although in Tier 3, has outstanding disciplinary strength and is worth special attention for candidates interested in agriculture and forestry.
